src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add LocalDate import to support parsing the date string in the new getDate() method.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: The new getDate() method uses LocalDate.parse(), which requires the java.time.LocalDate import to compile.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add getDate() method to satisfy the DateAware interface contract and allow date parsing.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: The class implements DateAware, which requires a getDate() method; omitting it causes a compile error.

Remove Spring Framework annotations and dependencies to decouple the utility class from the Spring container.

Replace instance method call with static method call to support the static nature of the refactored class.
Add defensive check for non-finite results (NaN/Infinity) to prevent invalid data propagation.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Migrate instance-based initialization to static block to support static state and method access.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: The class fields and methods are made static, so instance initialization in the constructor is no longer valid or sufficient for static context.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Update CPI data source filename to match new casing convention.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: The original file 'cpi.json' may have been renamed to 'CPI.json' in the repository, causing a FileNotFoundException if not updated.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Add loading of historical CPI data from a CSV file on the classpath.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: This is a feature addition to support older dates (1913-1947), not a JDK compatibility fix.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Convert instance method to static method to align with static state.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: The method accesses static fields and contains no instance state, so it must be static to be callable without an instance or to match the new static design.

src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.general_idea: Implement CSV parsing utility using InputStream.readAllBytes() for classpath resources.
src/main/java/com/helospark/financialdat.why_exists: This is a new feature implementation. While readAllBytes() was added in Java 9, the migration is J17->J21, so this is not a breaking change for the target JDK.
